title: RizinOS - The First Online Operating System
description: The modern web-based operating system that revolutionizes your work. Available everywhere, always synchronized.
hero_title: The operating system that runs in your browser
hero_subtitle: Built on Rust WASM modules and a NixOS-inspired architecture. No hardware. No drivers. No OS errors. By design. Adapts to your device: feels at home on phones, tablets, and desktops alike.
zero_errors_title: The first OS that cannot fail.
zero_errors_desc: Traditional operating systems fail because they depend on hardware, drivers, and mutable state. RizinOS eliminates all three. Running in the browser means no hardware abstractions to break, no drivers to conflict, and no system state to corrupt.
hardware_independent_desc: No device drivers. No hardware conflicts. The browser is the hardware layer, and browsers are extremely good at that job.
declarative_config_desc: Every system setting is version-controlled and reproducible. No configuration drift between environments, ever.
atomic_updates_desc: System updates apply atomically or not at all. Failed updates roll back automatically. You can undo any change, any time.
features_era_title: Built for the next era of computing.
feature_rust_wasm_desc: Core OS modules written in Rust, compiled to WebAssembly. Near-native performance, entirely in the browser.
feature_nixos_desc: Declarative, version-controlled system configuration. Roll back any change at any time.
feature_encryption_desc: All storage is encrypted before it leaves your device. The server never sees your plaintext.
feature_instant_desc: No POST. No drivers. No loading. Open a tab and your OS is there, exactly as you left it.
feature_bgapp_desc: Optional native companion for file sync, peripheral access, and push notifications from your device.
feature_collab_desc: Shared sessions on files and apps, built at the OS level. Not bolted on per-app.
bg_app_desc: Install the optional Background App to bridge RizinOS with your device. File sync, peripheral access, and native notifications, without giving up the browser-first architecture.
sync_bidirectional: Bidirectional file sync between device and cloud VFS
sync_native_dnd: Native drag-and-drop uploads from your desktop
sync_backups: Continuous versioned backups with configurable retention
sync_push_notif: Push notifications even when the browser tab is closed
sync_peripherals: Peripheral bridging: cameras, microphones, USB, serial
sync_offline: Offline mode with automatic sync on reconnect
arch_desc: Rust modules compile to WASM and run as the kernel layer. SvelteKit drives the system shell. Each app is an isolated WASM process with its own memory space and typed IPC to the OS. Nothing is shared implicitly.
arch_ipc_note: All layers communicate through typed IPC interfaces
apps_desc: Every app shares a unified permission model, file protocol, and design system. They are OS citizens, not plugins.
apps_roadmap: + Minecraft integration, AI assistant, Stripe payments, video calling in the roadmap
cta_title: Your OS is waiting. Open a tab.
cta_desc: No downloads. No setup. Works on any device, any screen size, any browser.
cta_note: Free tier forever - No credit card - 10 GB cloud storage included
login_tagline: Your OS is waiting for you.
login_tagline_desc: Sign in to access your cloud desktop from any device, anywhere.
login_highlight_any_device: Access from any device, any browser
signup_free_note: Free forever - No credit card required - GDPR compliant
signup_tos_text: I have read and agree to RizinOS' Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
signup_birthdate_required: Please enter your date of birth.
signup_age_requirement: You must be at least 13 years old.
signup_finish_desc: Claim your account by entering an email and password.
signup_confirm_sent: We've sent a confirmation link to:
signup_check_spam: Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
signup_username_too_short: Username must be at least 3 characters.
signup_username_too_long: Username must be at most 20 characters.
signup_username_invalid_chars: Only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens are allowed.
signup_birthdate_future: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
